chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1511 of 2019 Const. Pett. No.D-1204 of 2019 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 25.09.2025 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai, Advocate for petitioners in CP No.D-1204 Mr.Shahryar I Awan, Assistant Advocate General ************** CP No.D-1511/2019 Syed Zafar Ali Shah, Advocate, holds brief for Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the petitioners, and submits that the latter is busy before another Bench of this Court. However, under instructions, he does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. CP No.D-1204/2019 Counsel for the petitioners submits that the grievance of the petitioners has been redressed; therefore, for the time being he does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, same is dismissed as not pressed. Office is directed to place the signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
